description:
Create a post-purchase satisfaction survey titled 'Q4 2024 Post-Purchase Customer Satisfaction' in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). Include a question group named 'Purchase Experience' with at least one question. Configure the survey with participant tokens and define four custom token attributes: 'Customer Segment', 'Store Region', 'Loyalty Tier', and 'Annual Spend Bracket'. Add the following eight participants with their respective attributes:

- Sarah Mitchell (s.mitchell@globalretail.com): Premium, Northeast, Gold, High
- James Rodriguez (j.rodriguez@globalretail.com): Standard, Southeast, Silver, Medium
- Wei Chen (w.chen@globalretail.com): Premium, West, Gold, High
- Aisha Patel (a.patel@globalretail.com): Budget, Midwest, Bronze, Low
- Marcus Thompson (m.thompson@globalretail.com): Standard, Northeast, Silver, Medium
- Elena Kowalski (e.kowalski@globalretail.com): Premium, Southeast, Gold, High
- David Okafor (d.okafor@globalretail.com): Budget, West, Bronze, Low
- Lisa Nakamura (l.nakamura@globalretail.com): Standard, Midwest, Silver, Medium
